injuries.comment: The Stars said that Duchene is OUT for Thursday's (Oct. 16) game versus the Canucks.
The Canucks said that Joseph sported a non-contact jersey during Tuesday's (Oct. 14) practice, per Brendan Batchelor of Sportsnet 650.
The Canucks said that Blueger is Questionable for Thursday's (Oct. 16) game versus the Stars, per Brendan Batchelor of Sportsnet 650.
